creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that the subject should mention the full path relative to your
PORTSDIR, i. e. sysutils/e2fsprogs, because it is then auto-assigned to me.

Note also that the proper category for ports bugs is ports, not misc.


There is not a chance that I can reproduce this; I don't even get hits
when trying to "grep -r mk_subst" on the configured WRKSRC directory.
Two people have tried this on a dozen machines altogether, amd64, i386,
7.X, 8.X, 9.X, 10.X - we were unable to reproduce this.

Please answer these questions:

- How exactly is your ports tree updated?

- Please run:
(cd /usr/ports/sysutils/e2fsprogs && make clean && \
find . -type f -exec md5 '{}' +)

and paste the output.

- Please show your portmaster settings (portmasterrc, command line options)
